member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.DataSync
member.summary: Entrypoint for PubNub Data Sync operations

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateEntityParameters
member.summary: Parameters for creating a new entity via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateEntityParameters.Id
member.summary: Entity identifier. Optional — if not provided, the server generates one. Must be 1–255 characters if provided.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateEntityParameters.EntityClass
member.summary: Entity class identifier (e.g., "vehicle", "order", "sensor"). Required. Immutable after creation.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateEntityParameters.EntityClassVersion
member.summary: Schema version of the entity class. Required. Must be >= 1.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateEntityParameters.Status
member.summary: Entity status (e.g., "active", "inactive"). 1–100 characters.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateEntityParameters.Payload
member.summary: User-defined custom properties. Supports arbitrarily nested objects.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateEntityParameters.IdempotencyKey
member.summary: Idempotency key (UUIDv4) to ensure the request is processed exactly once. Required for POST requests.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.DeleteEntityParameters
member.summary: Parameters for deleting an entity by ID via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.DeleteEntityParameters.Id
member.summary: Entity identifier. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.DeleteEntityParameters.IfMatch
member.summary: ETag for optimistic concurrency control. If provided, the server rejects the delete when the current resource version does not match (HTTP 412).

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters
member.summary: Parameters for listing entities via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters.EntityClass
member.summary: Entity class name to filter by. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters.EntityClassVersion
member.summary: Schema version of the entity class. Optional — if not provided the server returns entities matching the latest version.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters.Cursor
member.summary: Pagination cursor returned from a previous request.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters.Limit
member.summary: Maximum number of items to return per page. Min 1, max 100, default 20.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters.Filter
member.summary: Filter expression using AppContext Query Language (e.g., "status == 'active'").

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters.FilterAdvanced
member.summary: Advanced filter expression supporting logical operators and nested conditions.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntitiesParameters.Sort
member.summary: Comma-separated list of fields to sort by. Prefix with + for ascending or - for descending (default). Example: "-createdAt,+id".

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PNDataSyncEntitiesListResult
member.summary: Result returned by GetEntities (list) containing an array of entities plus cursor-based pagination metadata and HATEOAS links.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PaginationMeta
member.summary: Cursor-based pagination metadata returned in list responses.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PaginationLinks
member.summary: HATEOAS navigation links returned in list responses.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntityParameters
member.summary: Parameters for retrieving an entity by ID via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetEntityParameters.Id
member.summary: Entity identifier. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchEntityParameters.Id
member.summary: Entity identifier. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchEntityParameters.Operations
member.summary: List of JSON Patch operations (RFC 6902) to apply. Required; must contain at least one operation.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchEntityParameters.IfMatch
member.summary: ETag for optimistic concurrency control. If provided, the server rejects the patch when the current resource version does not match (HTTP 412).

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchEntityParameters.IdempotencyKey
member.summary: Idempotency key (UUIDv4) to ensure the request is processed exactly once. Required for PATCH requests.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.JsonPatchOperation
member.summary: A single JSON Patch operation as defined by RFC 6902.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.JsonPatchOperation.Op
member.summary: The operation to perform: "add", "remove", "replace", "move", "copy", or "test".

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.JsonPatchOperation.Path
member.summary: JSON Pointer (RFC 6901) to the target location.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.JsonPatchOperation.Value
member.summary: The value to apply. Required for "add", "replace", and "test" operations. Can be any JSON-serializable value including null.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.JsonPatchOperation.From
member.summary: Source location (JSON Pointer). Required for "move" and "copy" operations.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PNDataSyncEntityResult
member.summary: Result returned by a single-entity operation (Create, Get, Update, Patch). The server response envelope is deserialized into this type.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateEntityParameters
member.summary: Parameters for updating an entity with complete resource replacement (PUT) via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateEntityParameters.Id
member.summary: Entity identifier. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateEntityParameters.EntityClassVersion
member.summary: Schema version of the entity class. Required. Must be >= 1. Note: entityClass is immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateEntityParameters.Status
member.summary: Entity status (e.g., "active", "inactive"). 1–100 characters.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateEntityParameters.Payload
member.summary: User-defined custom properties. Supports arbitrarily nested objects. Replaces the entire payload — omitted fields are removed.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateEntityParameters.IfMatch
member.summary: ETag for optimistic concurrency control. If provided, the server rejects the update when the current resource version does not match (HTTP 412).

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters
member.summary: Parameters for creating a new relationship via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.Id
member.summary: Relationship identifier. Optional — if not provided, the server generates one. Must be 1–255 characters if provided.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.EntityAId
member.summary: First entity ID (the "A" side of the relationship). Required. Immutable after creation. Must be 1–255 characters.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.EntityBId
member.summary: Second entity ID (the "B" side of the relationship). Required. Immutable after creation. Must be 1–255 characters.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.RelationshipClass
member.summary: Relationship class identifier (e.g., "ProductOwner", "FriendOf"). Required. Immutable after creation.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.RelationshipClassVersion
member.summary: Version of the relationship class. Required. Must be >= 1.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.Status
member.summary: Relationship status (e.g., "active", "inactive"). 1–100 characters.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.Payload
member.summary: User-defined custom properties. Supports arbitrarily nested objects.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.CreateRelationshipParameters.IdempotencyKey
member.summary: Idempotency key (UUIDv4) to ensure the request is processed exactly once. Required for POST requests.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.DeleteRelationshipParameters
member.summary: Parameters for deleting a relationship by ID via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.DeleteRelationshipParameters.Id
member.summary: Relationship identifier. Required.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipParameters
member.summary: Parameters for retrieving a relationship by ID via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipParameters.Id
member.summary: Relationship identifier. Required.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters
member.summary: Parameters for listing relationships via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.RelationshipClass
member.summary: Relationship class name to filter by. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.EntityAId
member.summary: Filter relationships by the first entity (A-side) ID. Optional. At least one of EntityAId or EntityBId should be provided for meaningful results.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.EntityBId
member.summary: Filter relationships by the second entity (B-side) ID. Optional. At least one of EntityAId or EntityBId should be provided for meaningful results.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.Cursor
member.summary: Pagination cursor returned from a previous request.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.Limit
member.summary: Maximum number of items to return per page. Min 1, max 100, default 20.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.Filter
member.summary: Filter expression using AppContext Query Language (e.g., "status == 'active'").

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.FilterAdvanced
member.summary: Advanced filter expression supporting logical operators and nested conditions.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.GetRelationshipsParameters.Sort
member.summary: Comma-separated list of fields to sort by. Prefix with + for ascending or - for descending (default). Example: "-createdAt,+id".

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PNDataSyncRelationshipsListResult
member.summary: Result returned by GetRelationships (list) containing an array of relationships plus cursor-based pagination metadata and HATEOAS links.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchRelationshipParameters
member.summary: Parameters for partially updating a relationship via JSON Patch (RFC 6902).

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchRelationshipParameters.Id
member.summary: Relationship identifier. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchRelationshipParameters.Operations
member.summary: List of JSON Patch operations (RFC 6902) to apply. Required; must contain at least one operation.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchRelationshipParameters.IfMatch
member.summary: ETag for optimistic concurrency control. If provided, the server rejects the patch when the current resource version does not match (HTTP 412).

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PatchRelationshipParameters.IdempotencyKey
member.summary: Idempotency key (UUIDv4) to ensure the request is processed exactly once. Required for PATCH requests.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PNDataSyncRelationshipResult
member.summary: Result returned by a single-relationship operation (Create, Get, Update, Patch). The server response envelope is deserialized into this type.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateRelationshipParameters
member.summary: Parameters for updating a relationship with complete resource replacement (PUT) via DataSync.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateRelationshipParameters.Id
member.summary: Relationship identifier. Required.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateRelationshipParameters.RelationshipClassVersion
member.summary: Version of the relationship class. Required. Must be >= 1. Note: entityAId, entityBId, and relationshipClass are immutable and cannot be changed after creation.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateRelationshipParameters.Status
member.summary: Relationship status (e.g., "active", "inactive"). 1–100 characters.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateRelationshipParameters.Payload
member.summary: User-defined custom properties. Supports arbitrarily nested objects. Replaces the entire payload — omitted fields are removed.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.EndPoint.UpdateRelationshipParameters.IfMatch
member.summary: ETag for optimistic concurrency control. If provided, the server rejects the update when the current resource version does not match (HTTP 412).

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.OtherOperation.TranslateDateTimeToPubnubUnixNanoSeconds(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Convert the UTC/GMT DateTime to Unix Nano Seconds format

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.OtherOperation.TranslatePubnubUnixNanoSecondsToDateTime(System.Int64)
member.summary: Convert the Unix Nano Seconds format time to UTC/GMT DateTime

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.HereNowOperation.Limit(System.Int32)
member.summary: limit number of users details to be returned. default value is 1000.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.HereNowOperation.Offset(System.Int32)
member.summary: use this parameter to provide starting position of results for pagination purpose default value is 0.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.AddMessageActionOperation.MessageTimetoken(System.Int64)
member.summary: The publish timetoken of a parent message

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.PublishOperation.Ttl(System.Int32)
member.summary: ttl in hours

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.RemoveMessageActionOperation.MessageTimetoken(System.Int64)
member.summary: The publish timetoken of a parent message

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.RemoveMessageActionOperation.ActionTimetoken(System.Int64)
member.summary: The publish timetoken of the action

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.AddPushChannelOperation.Environment(PubnubApi.PushEnvironment)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only. Default = Development

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.AddPushChannelOperation.Topic(System.String)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.AuditPushChannelOperation.Environment(PubnubApi.PushEnvironment)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only. Default = Development

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.AuditPushChannelOperation.Topic(System.String)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.RemoveAllPushChannelsOperation.Environment(PubnubApi.PushEnvironment)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only. Default = Development

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.RemoveAllPushChannelsOperation.Topic(System.String)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.RemovePushChannelOperation.Environment(PubnubApi.PushEnvironment)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only. Default = Development

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EndPoint.RemovePushChannelOperation.Topic(System.String)
member.summary: Applies to APNS2 Only

member.name: T:PubnubApi.CBOR
member.summary: A simple not-all-covering implementation of CBOR serialisation/deserialisation for internal Pubnub ParseToken() usage Converted to C# from https://github.com/seba-aln/CBORCodec

member.name: M:PubnubApi.CBOR.Decode(System.String)
member.summary: Decode incoming hexadecimal string of data and outputing decoded values
member.exception: Thrown when input is invalid or unsupported type

member.name: M:PubnubApi.CBOR.SanitizeInput(System.String)
member.summary: Removes spaces, converts string to upper case and throws exception if input is not a valid hexadecimal string
member.exception: Thrown when input contains invalid characters

member.name: M:PubnubApi.CBOR.SanitizeOutput(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sanitizes the output value so it contains even number of characters and returns it upper cased
member.param: Should the length of output be in powers of two (2, 4, 8, 16)

member.name: M:PubnubApi.CBOR.Encode(System.Object,System.Byte)
member.summary: Encodes value to a hexadecimal CBOR string. Because C# does not differentiate byte strings and text strings the only way to manipulate output type of strings is to pass a string type (one of CBOR::TYPE_TEXT_STRING and CBOR::TYPE_BYTE_STRING).
member.exception: Thrown when unsupported type is passed

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Common.EventEmitter.SafeInvokeListener(System.Action,System.String)
member.summary: Safely invokes a listener callback with exception handling to prevent listener exceptions from affecting SDK operations.
member.param: The listener callback action to invoke.
The type of event being processed (for logging purposes).
member.remarks: This method ensures that exceptions thrown by user-provided listener callbacks do not crash the SDK or prevent other listeners from receiving events. All exceptions are logged at Warning level.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.EffectDispatcher.Dispatch(PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectInvocation)
member.summary: Dispatch an invocation i.e. call a registered effect handler.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.EffectDispatcher.Register``2(``1)
member.summary: Assign a handler implementation to an invocation.

member.name: E:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.Engine.OnEffectDispatch
member.summary: Subscribe to receive notification on effect dispatch

member.name: E:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.Engine.OnStateTransition
member.summary: Subscribe to receive notification on state transition

member.name: E:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.Engine.OnEventQueued
member.summary: Subscribe to receive notification on event being queued

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.Engine.ExecuteStateChange(PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.State,PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.State,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectInvocation})
member.summary: Launch the invocations associated with transitioning between states

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectHandler
member.summary: Generic effect handler.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectHandler`1
member.summary: Handler (implementation) for a given invocation. The invocation represents the input arguments of a handler.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.EffectCancellableHandler`2
member.summary: Implement a handler a cancellable invocation.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.EffectDoubleHandler`2
member.summary: Implement a handler for two invocations (meant for connect-reconnect pairs). Use EffectDoubleCancellableHandler to implement cancellable handler.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.EffectDoubleCancellableHandler`3
member.summary: Implement a handler for two invocations (meant for connect-reconnect pairs) with a cancel invocation

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.EffectDoubleCancellableHandler`4
member.summary: Implement a handler for two invocations (meant for connect-reconnect pairs) with a cancel invocation

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectInvocation
member.summary: An effect invocation. It represents calling Run() on a registered effect handler - calling it is orchestrated by the dispatcher.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectCancelInvocation
member.summary: A cancel effect invocation. It represents calling Cancel() on a registered effect handler - calling it is orchestrated by the dispatcher.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.State.Transition(PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEvent)
member.summary: The EE transition pure function.
member.returns: Target state and invocation list, or null for no-transition

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.EventQueue.Enqueue(PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEvent)
member.summary: Enqueue (fire) an event to the Event Engine. Handling that event is covered by the Engine itself.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.TransitionResult.#ctor(PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.State)
member.summary: Create a state-invocation pair with empty invocations

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.TransitionResult.#ctor(PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.State,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectInvocation})
member.summary: Create a state-invocation pair

member.name: M:PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.TransitionResult.#ctor(PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.State,PubnubApi.EventEngine.Core.IEffectInvocation[])
member.summary: Create a state-invocation pair

member.name: T:PubnubApi.PNPushTypeExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for PNPushType enum to get url value

member.name: M:PubnubApi.PNPushTypeExtensions.ToUrlString(PubnubApi.PNPushType)
member.summary: Converts PNPushType enum to the appropriate URL string. GCM is converted to 'fcm' since GCM is decommisioned.
member.returns: URL string representation of the push type

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MobilePushHelper.Apns2Data(System.Collections.Generic.List{PubnubApi.Apns2Data})
member.summary: Supports Only APNS2

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Read
member.summary: Read. Applies to Subscribe, History, Presence

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Write
member.summary: Write. Applies to Publish

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Manage
member.summary: Manage. Applies to Channel-Groups, Objects

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Delete
member.summary: Delete. Applies to History, Objects

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Create
member.summary: Create. Applies to Objects v1

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Get
member.summary: Get. Applies to Objects v2

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Update
member.summary: Update. Applies to Objects v2

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNTokenAuthValues.Join
member.summary: Join. Applies to Objects v2

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeEnvelope.m
member.summary: messages

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeEnvelope.t
member.summary: subscribeMetadata

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.a
member.summary: shard

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.b
member.summary: subscriptionMatch

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.c
member.summary: channel

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.d
member.summary: payload

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.e
member.summary: message type indicator

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.f
member.summary: flags

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.i
member.summary: issuingClientId

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.k
member.summary: subscribeKey

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.s
member.summary: sequenceNumber

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.o
member.summary: originatingTimetoken

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.p
member.summary: publishMetadata

member.name: P:PubnubApi.SubscribeMessage.u
member.summary: userMetadata

member.name: P:PubnubApi.TimetokenMetadata.t
member.summary: timetoken

member.name: P:PubnubApi.TimetokenMetadata.r
member.summary: region

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNConfiguration.SplitSubscribeCalls
member.summary:
When enabled single multi-channel subscriptions will internally be changed into multiple single-channel ones. Enable this option if your keyset has channel-based sharding enabled. This option requires Event Engine to be enabled (it's on by default).
WARNING: Enabling this option will also:
Disable subscribing to channel groups
Disable subscribing with WithPresence() (you can still explicitly subscribe to *-pnpres channels directly)
Generate more server requests, potentially increasing costs

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNConfiguration.LogVerbosity
member.summary: This property is obsolete. Use instead.
member.remarks: LogVerbosity is deprecated. Use LogLevel to enable logging. LogLevel provides more granular control and supports different standard logging levels. To migrate, replace LogVerbosity = X with LogLevel = (LogLevel)X.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.PNConfiguration.PubnubLog
member.summary: This property is deprecated. Use method to configure custom logger.
member.remarks: PubnubLog is deprecated. Implement IPubnubLogger and Use SetLogger method to configure custom logger for improved flexibility and control.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.Pubnub.CleanUp
member.summary: Call this function to globally clean up all background threads running in the SDK. Note that this will unsubscribe all channels.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.Pubnub.ParseToken(System.String)
member.summary: Parses the token and provides token details. This is client only method (works without secret key)

member.name: M:PubnubApi.Pubnub.SetAuthToken(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the auth token. This is client only method (works without secret key)

member.name: M:PubnubApi.Pubnub.SetLogger(PubnubApi.IPubnubLogger)
member.summary: Configures a custom logger.

member.name: P:PubnubApi.Security.Crypto.ICryptor.Identifier
member.summary:
Unique crypto algorithm identifier.
Identifier will be encoded into crypto data header and passed along with encrypted data.
The identifier **must** be 4 bytes long.

member.name: T:PubnubApi.MD5
member.summary: MD5 Service provider
MD5 messaging-digest algorithm is a widely used cryptographic hash function that produces 128-bit hash value.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MD5.ROTATE_LEFT(System.UInt32,System.Byte)
member.summary: rotates x left n bits.

members.member: FF, GG, HH, and II transformations for rounds 1, 2, 3, and 4. Rotation is separate from addition to prevent re-computation.

member.name: F:PubnubApi.MD5.state
member.summary: state (ABCD)

member.name: F:PubnubApi.MD5.count
member.summary: number of bits, modulo 2^64 (LSB first)

member.name: F:PubnubApi.MD5.buffer
member.summary: input buffer

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MD5.Initialize
member.summary: MD5 initialization. Begins an MD5 operation, writing a new context.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MD5.HashCore(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: MD5 block update operation. Continues an MD5 message-digest operation, processing another message block, and updating the context.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MD5.HashFinal
member.summary: MD5 finalization. Ends an MD5 message-digest operation, writing the the message digest and zeroizing the context.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MD5.Transform(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: MD5 basic transformation. Transforms state based on 64 bytes block.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MD5.Encode(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.UInt32[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Encodes input (uint) into output (byte). Assumes len is multiple of 4.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.MD5.Decode(System.UInt32[],System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Decodes input (byte) into output (uint). Assumes len is a multiple of 4.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.PubnubCryptoBase.ComputeHashRaw(System.String)
member.summary: Computes the hash using the specified algo

members.member:
EncryptOrDecrypt
Basic function for encrypt or decrypt a string for encrypt type = true for decrypt type = false

member.name: M:PubnubApi.PubnubCryptoBase.ConvertHexToUnicodeChars(System.String)
member.summary: Converts the upper case hex to lower case hex.

member.name: M:PubnubApi.PubnubCryptoBase.EncodeNonAsciiCharacters(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes the non ASCII characters.
